revision.comment: Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Cl]] to [[Template:Category link]] over redirect: [[Special:Permalink/740508935|Requested]] by Nyuszika7H at [[WP:RM/TR]]: The template should be located at the natural, unabbreviated title and {{[[Temp...

revision.text: [[:Category:{{{1}}}|Cat:{{{1}}}]]<noinclude> ---- This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. ==See also== * {{tl|cl}} * {{tl|ccl}} [[Category:Internal link templates|Cl]] </noinclude>

[[:Category:{{{1}}}|Cat:{{{1}}}]]<noinclude> ---- This [[Wikipedia:Template|template]] is a [[Wikipedia:Avoid self-references|self-reference]] and so is part of the Wikipedia project rather than the encyclopaedic content. [[Category:Internal link templates|Cl]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Setting up documentation sub-page to allow interwikis and reduce transclusion footprint
Display "cat" on SfD per Grutness 2005, Category elsewhere
Add the ability to get a count of pages in category.
Listed for merging with [[:Template:Cat]]; see [[:Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 July 7#Template:Cat]].
sync with sandbox; inline param for tfd notice
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 July 7#Template:Cat]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.15|XFDcloser]])
sync with sandbox, which allows for the option of a category prefix and reduces calls to the [[WP:EXPENSIVE]] PAGESINCAT

revision.comment: Setting up documentation sub-page to allow interwikis and reduce transclusion footprint
Display "cat" on SfD per Grutness 2005, Category elsewhere
Undid revision 356605856 by [[Special:Contributions/Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]] ([[User talk:Rich Farmbrough|talk]])
Add the ability to get a count of pages in category.
Listed for merging with [[:Template:Cat]]; see [[:Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 July 7#Template:Cat]].
sync with sandbox; inline param for tfd notice
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 July 7#Template:Cat]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.15|XFDcloser]])

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Category link/core|1={{PAGENAME:{{{1}}}}}|2={{{2|Category:{{PAGENAME:{{{1}}}}}}}}|count={{{count|no}}}|page_count={{PAGESINCAT:{{PAGENAME:{{{1}}}}}|{{UC:{{{count_type|ALL}}}}}|R}}|backlog={{{backlog|{{formatnum:{{NUMBEROFPAGES}}|R}}}}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
